security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; media-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:* ws://localhost:* ws://127.0.0.1:*; frame-src 'self' http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:*; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'none'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; worker-src 'self'; manifest-src 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: Parallel coding-agent shells in one window.
bundle.longDescription: Loom is a multi-pane terminal for orchestrating coding agents (Claude, Codex, OpenCode, Gemini, Grok) side-by-side in one workspace, with presets, port detection, and session resume.
